product_overview: Premium CGPA Calculator is a modern student-focused GPA and CGPA tool that helps users calculate academic performance, track target goals, and visualize grade trends. It also supports secure account access and cloud-synced academic records.
core_goals: Create an account and sign in securely
Build and maintain semester-by-semester academic records
View cumulative GPA and related grade analytics
Predict what is needed to reach a target CGPA
Export academic records as a transcript PDF

features.name: User Login & Registration
features.description: Users can create an account or sign in with email and password, then complete email verification before accessing the app.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle between Sign In and Sign Up -> Fill email and password -> Submit the authentication form -> See the verification screen -> Enter the 6-digit code -> Verify the account -> See the dashboard

Navigate to / -> Toggle between Sign In and Sign Up -> Fill full name, email, and password -> Submit the registration form -> See the verification screen -> Enter the 6-digit code -> Verify the account -> See the dashboard
Navigate to / -> Toggle between Sign In and Sign Up -> Fill email and password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the dashboard

Navigate to / -> Toggle between Sign In and Sign Up -> Fill email and password -> Toggle password visibility -> Submit the authentication form -> See the verification screen or dashboard depending on account status

features.name: Dashboard & CGPA Calculation
features.description: Users can enter semester subjects, credits, and grades to calculate and manage their CGPA on the main dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Sign in -> See the dashboard with CGPA summary and performance chart -> Add a semester -> Fill subject name, credits, and grade -> Add more subjects or remove subjects as needed -> Save data -> See the updated CGPA and synced status
Navigate to / -> Sign in -> See the dashboard -> Add multiple semesters -> Update subject details across semesters -> Save data -> See the recalculated CGPA and chart changes
Navigate to / -> Sign in -> See the dashboard -> Delete an entire semester -> Save data -> See the updated CGPA summary
Navigate to / -> Sign in -> See the dashboard -> Reset all academic data -> Confirm the cleared state -> See the dashboard with no saved records

features.name: Target Tracker
features.description: Users can estimate what credits and grade expectations are needed to achieve a desired CGPA.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Sign in -> See the target tracker section -> Enter a target CGPA -> Select an expected grade -> Enter credits per semester -> View the prediction message and progress bar
Navigate to / -> Sign in -> See the target tracker section -> Enter a target CGPA -> Change the expected grade or credits per semester -> View the updated prediction result

features.name: Grade Distribution
features.description: Users can inspect a donut chart showing how their grades are distributed across recorded subjects.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Sign in -> See the grade distribution chart -> Hover over a chart slice -> View the tooltip details
Navigate to / -> Sign in -> Add or update semester data -> See the grade distribution chart refresh with the new counts -> Hover over slices to compare grade breakdowns

features.name: PDF Transcript Export
features.description: Users can export their recorded academic history as a printable PDF transcript.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Sign in -> See the dashboard -> Review the recorded semesters -> Export the transcript -> See the print-ready PDF
Navigate to / -> Sign in -> Add or update semester data -> Export the transcript -> Open the generated transcript preview for printing

routes.description: Main landing/dashboard page which determines auth state and renders Login or Dashboard.

features.name: User Login & Registration
features.description: Login with email/password, register with email/password, verify OTP, and Google OAuth.
user_interactions: Toggle between Sign In and Sign Up tabs
Fill email and password input fields
Click Sign In / Create Account button
Enter 6-digit OTP code on verification screen

features.name: Dashboard & CGPA Calculation
features.description: Main dashboard displaying Cumulative GPA, performance chart, and syncing data to InsForge.
user_interactions: View CGPA stat and line chart
Fill Subject Name, Credits, and Grade in SemesterCard
Add or remove subjects from a semester
Click Reset All to clear data
Click Export Transcript to print PDF

features.name: Target Tracker
features.description: Predicts required credits to reach a target CGPA.
user_interactions: View prediction message and progress bar

features.name: Grade Distribution
features.description: Visualizes grade counts in a donut chart.
user_interactions: Hover over pie chart slices to see tooltips
